description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Introduces output color(s) [0] and removes input color(s) [1]. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_a740d043(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, T, T)
    x2 = merge(x1)
    x3 = subgrid(x2, I)
    O = replace(x3, ONE, ZERO)
    return O
